effects_provenance.raw: Gruntz THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Gruntz THCA Flower is a flavor-led hybrid in the broader Runtz family that brings a heavier gassy edge to the classic candy-sweet profile. The cultivar produces dense, frost-coated buds with the kind of layered aromatic character that combines tropical fruit candy with a subtle fuel undertone. Effects Gruntz delivers a balanced experience that pairs warm cerebral euphoria with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of contrasting character that distinguishes Runtz-gas crosses. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: sweet tropical fruit up front, with sugary candy through the middle and a warm gas finish on the exhale. Smoke is full and unmistakably layered. The terpene profile reads candy-and-gas — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Gruntz harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Gruntz THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Gruntz THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. hybrid Sugar Sweet Tropical Fruit THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Petrol Pie THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Petrol Pie THCA Flower is a hybrid bred from Jet Fuel crossed with Wedding Pie . The cross marries the electric, gas-forward aromatic backbone of Jet Fuel with the irresistible dessert sweetness of Wedding Pie — producing dense buds with serious bag appeal and a flavor profile that genuinely uses both halves of its genetic stack. Effects Petrol Pie delivers a harmonious balance of energizing onset and smooth descent into relaxation. The high feels engaging up front — good for users who want a thrill component — before settling into a comfortable, body-easy baseline. A versatile cultivar for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening unwinding. Flavor & Aroma On the nose: pungent jet fuel up front, with sweet pastry-cake through the middle and a warm dessert-meets-gas finish on the exhale. Smoke is full and assertively flavored. The terpene profile reads gas-and-bakery — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Petrol Pie harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Petrol Pie THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Petrol Pie THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. effects_provenance.raw: High Octane THCa Weight: 14g High Octane THCa tests at 28.06% THCa and delivers a mid-high potency hybrid experience with a distinctly fuel-forward personality. The effects come on with a fast head change, then build into a deeper body relaxation that feels grounding and full-bodied by the end of the session. This strain carries a darker, gassier profile than sweeter dessert hybrids, which gives it a more forceful and late-day character. It’s the perfect strain for evening smoking, movie nights, or slowing things down after a long day. 28.06% total THCa 28.25% total cannabinoids Hybrid / Anytime strain Greenhouse Grown Farm bill compliant (below .3% delta-9 THC) Certificate of Analysis (COA) [vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1575559006742{padding-top: 35px !important;}” mobile_bg_img_hidden=”no” tablet_bg_img_hidden=”no” woodmart_parallax=”0′′ woodmart_gradient_switch=”no” row_reverse_mobile=”0′′ row_reverse_tablet=”0′′ woodmart_disable_overflow=”0′′ el_id=”more”][vc_column width=”2/3′′ css=”.vc_custom_1575559577606{margin-bottom: 4vh !important;padding-top: 0px !important;}” offset=”vc_col-sm-offset-2′′ mobile_bg_img_hidden=”no” tablet_bg_img_hidden=”no” woodmart_parallax=”0′′ woodmart_sticky_column=”false” parallax_scroll=”no” mobile_reset_margin=”no” tablet_reset_margin=”no”] High Octane THCa Flower [vc_tta_accordion style=”flat” color=”black” c_icon=”chevron” c_position=”right” active_section=”1′′][vc_tta_section title=”Visual” tab_id=”visual”][vc_column_text css=”” text_larger=”yes” woodmart_inline=”no”]The buds of High Octane THCa are chunky, tightly stacked, and heavily coated, with a thick blanket of trichomes that gives the flower a pale, dusty-green cast. lineage_provenance.raw: Balanced Hybrid

effects_provenance.raw: Blue Dream THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa What is Blue Dream THCa Flower Strain? Blue Dream THCa Flower Strain is a beloved sativa-dominant hybrid, resulting from the cross of Blueberry and Haze, often credited to the legendary breeder DJ Short from Santa Cruz. This strain has become a staple in the cannabis world, cherished for its balanced cerebral buzz and full-body relaxation, making it a versatile choice for both recreational and medicinal users. Blue Dream Terpenes Blue Dream's terpene profile is a blend of: Pinene: Contributes a fresh, pine-like aroma, potentially aiding in alertness and memory retention. Myrcene: Adds an earthy, musky scent, known for its sedative effects, enhancing the strain's relaxing properties. Caryophyllene: Brings a spicy, peppery note, which might offer anti-inflammatory benefits, complementing the strain's therapeutic profile. These terpenes not only shape Blue Dream's distinctive aroma but also enhance its overall effects. Blue Dream Strain Cannabinoids THCA: 24.51% Total Cannabinoids: 25.44% Total Terpenes: 1.36% D9-THC: 0.24% Blue Dream THCA Strain Effects Blue Dream delivers a well-balanced high, starting with a clear-headed euphoria that sparks creativity and focus, making it excellent for daytime activities. As the experience evolves, it transitions into a gentle, soothing body relaxation, easing physical tension without overwhelming drowsiness. This makes Blue Dream a versatile choice for users looking to maintain productivity while enjoying a sense of calm and well-being. Genotype: Blueberry x Haze (Bred by DJ Short) Phenotype: Blue Dream Hemp Flower contains less than .3% Delta 9 THC For Adult Use Only Already vibin’??? 👉Might as well explore the full THCa Hemp flower collection. OR... 👉Check out our CBD Hemp flower collection for a SMOOTHER vibe. effects_provenance.raw: GMO THCa Weight: 14g GMO THCa (a.k.a. GMO Cookies or Garlic Cookies) is a powerhouse indica-dominant strain with pungent aroma, knockout potency, and long-lasting, heavy-hitting effects. At 32.66% THCa, this batch is not for the faint of heart so expect an initial wave of euphoric bliss followed by a deep, full-body melt that lingers. It’s the perfect choice for experienced cannabis fans looking for that classic, hard-hitting gas-and-garlic profile in a beautifully grown top-shelf greenhouse flower. Best saved for evenings or lazy days when you have nowhere to be. 32.66% total THCa 33.94% total cannabinoids Indica / Nighttime strain Greenhouse Grown Farm bill compliant (below .3% delta-9 THC) View strain video [vc_column_text css=”” woodmart_inline=”no” text_larger=”no”] ﻿ [/vc_column_text] Certificate of Analysis (COA) [vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1575559006742{padding-top: 35px !important;}” mobile_bg_img_hidden=”no” tablet_bg_img_hidden=”no” woodmart_parallax=”0′′ woodmart_gradient_switch=”no” row_reverse_mobile=”0′′ row_reverse_tablet=”0′′ woodmart_disable_overflow=”0′′ el_id=”more”][vc_column width=”2/3′′ css=”.vc_custom_1575559577606{margin-bottom: 4vh !important;padding-top: 0px !important;}” offset=”vc_col-sm-offset-2′′ mobile_bg_img_hidden=”no” tablet_bg_img_hidden=”no” woodmart_parallax=”0′′ woodmart_sticky_column=”false” parallax_scroll=”no” mobile_reset_margin=”no” tablet_reset_margin=”no”] GMO THCa Flower * GMO Cookies / Garlic Cookies * [vc_tta_accordion style=”flat” color=”black” c_icon=”chevron” c_position=”right” active_section=”1′′][vc_tta_section title=”Visual” tab_id=”visual”][vc_column_text css=”” text_larger=”yes” woodmart_inline=”no”]GMO THCa buds are thick, chunky, and coated in frosty trichomes that sparkle under the light. effects_provenance.raw: Time Machine 3.5g (1/8 oz) Time Machine is a potent hybrid that blends sweet candy fruit notes with earthy gas and a smooth herbal finish for a nostalgic, flavorful smoke. Bright citrus and berry flavors hit first before settling into a rich diesel backbone that lingers on the exhale. The effects come on with an uplifting cerebral buzz that gradually melts into a relaxed, hazy body high. effects_provenance.raw: Street Tartz THCa Indoor Weight: 3.5g Street Tartz THCa Indoor tests at 31.16% THCa, an indica leaning hybrid from Purple City Genetics that pairs loud bakery terps with a deeply calming finish. The effects open with a pleasant cerebral lift that brightens mood and melts tension from the mind first. The high then builds downward into the body, layering in a soothing heaviness that loosens shoulders and slows the pace. It settles into a relaxed, sleepy-edged calm that makes the couch feel very convincing. It’s the perfect strain for evenings at home, unwinding after dinner, and capping off a long day. 31.16% total THCa 31.34% total cannabinoids Indica dom. effects_provenance.raw: Gelato #33 THCA Flower Preferred / 28g Strain Profile Gelato 33 THCA Flower is a balanced hybrid born from Sunset Sherbet crossed with Thin Mint Girl Scout Cookies . One of the most influential phenotypes in the broader Gelato family, Gelato 33 is celebrated for its dense, structurally premium buds, vibrant orange hair expression, and the unmistakable Cookies-lineage aromatic depth. Effects Gelato 33 delivers a well-rounded experience that pairs euphoric cerebral lift with a comfortable, body-easy baseline. The high feels balanced and steady — suitable for daytime social use, late-afternoon decompression, or evening wind-down. A reliable Gelato-family cultivar that earns its reputation for versatility. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: sweet, creamy gelato up front, with a layered cookie-and-cream middle and a smooth dessert finish on the exhale. Smoke is silky and unmistakably dessert-rich. The terpene profile reads sweet-cream with cookie depth — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Gelato #33 harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Gelato #33 THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Gelato #33 THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Cookie Cream hybrid Sweet THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Secret Cookies THCa Indoor Weight: 3.5g Secret Cookies tests at 30.63% THCa, giving this indoor batch a strong, full-bodied effect with enough punch to satisfy experienced smokers. The effects come on with an easy mental lift that clears the head and puts you in a better lane fast. As it builds, that upbeat edge rounds into a steady hybrid balance with calm through the body and a settled, content finish that does not feel sloppy. It’s the perfect strain for evening sessions, laid-back social time, or shutting down the noise without checking out completely. 30.63% total THCa 31.56% total cannabinoids Indica / Nighttime strain Indoor Grown Farm bill compliant (below .3% delta-9 THC) Certificate of Analysis (COA) [vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” content_placement=”middle” css=”.vc_custom_1575559006742{padding-top: 35px !important;}” mobile_bg_img_hidden=”no” tablet_bg_img_hidden=”no” woodmart_parallax=”0′′ woodmart_gradient_switch=”no” row_reverse_mobile=”0′′ row_reverse_tablet=”0′′ woodmart_disable_overflow=”0′′ el_id=”more”][vc_column width=”2/3′′ css=”.vc_custom_1575559577606{margin-bottom: 4vh !important;padding-top: 0px !important;}” offset=”vc_col-sm-offset-2′′ mobile_bg_img_hidden=”no” tablet_bg_img_hidden=”no” woodmart_parallax=”0′′ woodmart_sticky_column=”false” parallax_scroll=”no” mobile_reset_margin=”no” tablet_reset_margin=”no”] Secret Cookies THCa Flower [vc_tta_accordion style=”flat” color=”black” c_icon=”chevron” c_position=”right” active_section=”1′′][vc_tta_section title=”Visual” tab_id=”visual”][vc_column_text css=”” text_larger=”yes” woodmart_inline=”no”]Secret Cookies THCa has dense, chunky, and heavily frosted buds, with a thick layer of trichomes giving the flower a pale silver cast over deep violet and charcoal tones. Small flashes of green push through the darker color, while thin amber pistils stay tucked into the surface rather than dominating the structure.[/vc_column_text][/vc_tta_section][vc_tta_section title=”Aroma” tab_id=”aroma”][vc_column_text css=”” text_larger=”yes” woodmart_inline=”no”]The nose of Secret Cookies THCa opens with sweet cookie dough and dark berry notes right away. Under that sweetness, there is a deeper mix of earth, spice, and a faint diesel edge that gives it more weight. Once the bud is broken open, the profile gets richer and more layered, pushing out baked dessert notes with a sharper fruity funk behind them.[/vc_column_text][/vc_tta_section][vc_tta_se

effects_provenance.raw: Lemon Cherry Beltz THCA Flower Essential / 28g (Smalls) Strain Profile Lemon Cherry Beltz THCA Flower is an elite, flavor-packed hybrid engineered for connoisseurs who demand a sensory explosion alongside top-tier potency. A masterful fusion of the wildly popular Lemon Cherry Gelato and the legendary, candy-forward Rainbow Belts, this cultivar represents the pinnacle of modern boutique breeding. The buds are striking and intricately structured, displaying a vibrant contrast of lime greens, deep magenta pockets, and vivid orange pistils. The entire flower is heavily dusted in a thick, sticky layer of crystalline trichomes, highlighting its exceptional THCA content and pristine, resinous cure. Effects Lemon Cherry Beltz offers a perfectly balanced, multi-dimensional high that satisfies both the mind and the body. The experience begins with an immediate, uplifting cerebral rush that sparks creativity, elevates the mood, and induces a blissful, carefree euphoria. As the mental buzz settles into a comfortable, starlit haze, a soothing wave of physical relaxation begins to radiate through the limbs. It effectively melts away daily stress and minor physical tension without causing immediate sedation, making it incredibly versatile. It is the ultimate choice for elevating social gatherings, unlocking creative focus, or enjoying a premium afternoon wind-down. Flavor & Aroma True to its star-studded lineage, Lemon Cherry Beltz delivers a loud, mouth-watering terpene profile that perfectly captures the essence of sour fruit candy and gassy dessert genetics. Cracking open a bud unleashes a pungent blast of tart, zesty lemons and sweet, overripe cherries, wrapped in a sugary, candied-confection background with a sharp hint of fuel. The smoke is remarkably smooth and full-bodied; on the inhale, the palate is coated in a lip-smacking flavor of sour citrus and mixed berry glaze, while the exhale shifts beautifully to a smooth, creamy Gelato finish with a lingering touch of classic, gassy candy dust. Lab Tested — View the COA Lab Tested — View the COA Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller

effects_provenance.raw: Ice Cream Cake THCa Weight: 14g Ice Cream Cake THCa tests at 31.80% THCa, making it a highly potent strain with a rich, indica-leaning profile. The effects begin with a soft euphoric lift that smooths out the headspace and quickly gives way to a heavier body relaxation that feels warm, calming, and full. As the experience settles in, it becomes more immersive and slower-paced, trading early mood elevation for deeper physical ease and a quiet, grounded finish. It’s the perfect strain for late-night sessions, end-of-day decompression, or sinking into a full-bodied reset when you want the pace to come down. 31.80% total THCa 32.31% total cannabinoids Indica Dom.
